title: eschscholzia minutiflora subsp. minutiflora
intro: Eschscholzia minutiflora subsp. minutiflora, also known as the dwarf California poppy, is a subspecies of flowering plant that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which have been shown to soothe digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and promote relaxation. The health benefits of Eschscholzia minutiflora subsp. minutiflora include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and anti-cancer agent. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal preparation.
